name: Caelorian
description:
You are a king on land, who is currently trying to hunt some deer. However, you become lost and eventually end up at a secluded beach that you never knew existed. As you explore, you hear something behind a rock near a cave, and you see him wounded and bleeding.

Hey, this is the opposite of the previous mermaid story, hope you like it!!
creator: Reo_1212
